name: Broccoli Lasagna
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook noodles according to package directions. Drain, then toss with oil, salt and pepper until well coated.
2. Cook broccoli according to package directions. Drain.
3. Combine cottage cheese and sour cream in a bowl.
4. Arrange half of the noodles in a 12 x 8 baking dish. Cover with half of the broccoli and sauce, then a layer of cheese.
5. Add another layer of noodles, topped with remaining broccoli, sauce and cheese.
6. Add all of the cottage cheese mixture on top.
7. Top with remaining noodles and add sauce to cover. Sprinkle with mozzarella cheese.
8. Cover tightly with aluminum foil and refrigerate for about 30 minutes before serving.
9. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C) and bake for 30 minutes or until the cheese melts and is golden on top.
Serves 6.
